reference: I have a disc bulge; however, it hurts all the time, whether I am sitting, standing, or lying down. I am also losing weight consistently. I am fifty-three years old, my height is five feet four inches, and my current weight is one hundred and five pounds. I used to weigh one hundred and nineteen pounds. I am always tired and have no energy for anything. I took a thyroid test, which came out negative. What do you think?
text: I have a disc bulge. However, it hurts all the time, whether I am sitting, standing, or lying down. I am also losing weight consistently. I am 53 years old, my height is 5 feet 4 inches, and my current weight is 105 pounds. I used to weigh 119 pounds. I am always tired and have no energy for anything. I took a thyroid test, which came out negative. What do you think?
